{{Infobox character
| name = Vallenar
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Vallenar]] is the name of the protagonist.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Vallenar]] is a corporation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri]]'s surname is [[Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
